executives.name: Sundar Pichai
executives.background: Sundar Pichai has served as the Chief Executive Officer of Alphabet since December 2019 and as the Chief Executive Officer of Google since October 2015. He has been a member of Alphabet’s Board of Directors since July 2017. Since joining Google in 2004, he has held various leadership roles, including overseeing product management and innovation for a suite of Google’s consumer and enterprise products.

executives.name: Ruth Porat
executives.background: Ruth Porat has served as the President and Chief Investment Officer of Alphabet and Google since September 2023, and as the Chief Financial Officer of Alphabet and Google since May 2015. Prior to joining Google, she was at Morgan Stanley, where she served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer from 2010 to 2015.

executives.name: Prabhakar Raghavan
executives.background: Prabhakar Raghavan has served as Senior Vice President, Knowledge & Information at Google since June 2020. He previously served as Senior Vice President, Ads, Commerce and Payments from 2018 to 2020. Before joining Google in 2012, he was at Yahoo! Labs.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Technologist (formerly Senior Vice President, Knowledge & Information)

executives.name: Philipp Schindler
executives.background: Philipp Schindler has served as Senior Vice President, Chief Business Officer of Google since August 2015. He has held various leadership positions at Google since joining in 2005, including overseeing global sales and operations.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Chief Business Officer
Senior Vice President and Chief Business Officer

executives.name: Kent Walker
executives.background: Kent Walker has served as President, Global Affairs and Chief Legal Officer of Alphabet and Google since 2021. He joined Google in 2006 and has held various roles, including Senior Vice President, Global Affairs and General Counsel.

tenure_dates.title: President, Global Affairs and Chief Legal Officer
President, Global Affairs, and Chief Legal Officer

executives.name: Ann Mather
executives.background: Former CFO of Pixar. Director at Alphabet Inc., Netflix, and Bumble. Former director at Glu Mobile and MGM Holdings.

executives.name: Arthur Levinson
executives.background: Dr. Levinson has served as the CEO of Calico, a company focused on health, well-being, and longevity, since 2013. He previously served as CEO of Genentech, Inc. from 1995 to 2009 and as its Chairman from 1999 to 2014.

executives.name: Christian Kleinerman
executives.background: Christian Kleinerman has served as our Executive Vice President, Product Management since April 2024, and previously served as our Senior Vice President, Product Management since 2017. Prior to joining Snowflake, he held various product management roles at Google and Microsoft.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Product Management (YouTube Infrastructure and Data Systems)

executives.name: Cristina Bita
executives.background: Vice President of Finance at Google. Expert in finance and technology operations.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Finance Director / Vice President of Finance

executives.name: Dennis Kish
executives.background: Dennis Kish has served as our President since November 2023 and previously served as our Chief Operating Officer since January 2022. Prior to joining EVgo, Mr. Kish served as a Vice President at Google and as President of Qualcomm CDMA Technologies.

executives.name: Frances Arnold
executives.background: Frances H. Arnold has been a director since 2019. She is the Linus Pauling Professor of Chemical Engineering, Bioengineering and Biochemistry at the California Institute of Technology and a Nobel Laureate in Chemistry.

executives.name: John Doerr
executives.background: L. John Doerr has been a director since 1999. He is the Chairman of Kleiner Perkins, a venture capital firm.

executives.name: John Giannandrea
executives.background: John Giannandrea is Apple’s senior vice president of Machine Learning and AI Strategy, reporting to CEO Tim Cook. John joined Apple in 2018 and oversees the strategy for Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning across the company and the development of Core ML and Siri technologies.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Engineering (Head of Search and Artificial Intelligence)

executives.name: Larry Page
executives.background: Larry Page co-founded Google in 1998 and served as Alphabet’s CEO from 2015 to 2019. He has been a member of the Board of Directors since 1998.

executives.name: Nikesh Arora
executives.background: Nikesh Arora has served as our Chief Executive Officer and Chairman of our Board since June 2018. Prior to joining us, Mr. Arora served as President and Chief Operating Officer of SoftBank Group Corp. from October 2014 to June 2016. From 2004 to 2014, Mr. Arora held various positions at Google Inc., most recently as Senior Vice President and Chief Business Officer.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Business Officer

executives.name: Ram Shriram
executives.background: K. Ram Shriram has been a director since 1998. He is the managing director of Sherpalo Ventures, an angel investment firm.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Robin Washington
executives.background: Former EVP and CFO of Gilead Sciences, Inc. She has served as a Director since 2013.

executives.name: Roger Ferguson, Jr.
executives.background: Roger W. Ferguson, Jr. has been a director since 2016. He was the President and CEO of TIAA from 2008 to 2021 and served as Vice Chairman of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System.

executives.name: Sergey Brin
executives.background: Sergey Brin co-founded Google in 1998 and served as Alphabet’s President from 2015 to 2019. He has been a member of the Board of Directors since 1998.

executives.name: Sheryl Sandberg
executives.background: Former Chief Operating Officer of Meta Platforms, Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Global Online Sales and Operations

executives.name: Sridhar Ramaswamy
executives.background: Sridhar Ramaswamy has served as our Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our board of directors since February 2024. Prior to that, he served as our Senior Vice President, AI since May 2023. From 2019 to May 2023, Mr. Ramaswamy was the co-founder and Chief Executive Officer of Neeva Inc. Prior to that, he held various roles at Google from 2003 to 2018, most recently as Senior Vice President, Ads & Commerce.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Advertising and Commerce

executives.name: Susan Wojcicki
executives.background: Former CEO of YouTube. She has served as a Director since 2014.

board_of_directors.name: John Hennessy
